elements.name: Receiving Case : Single Line, Single iLPN
elements.description: Creating ASN through Post Message UI, checking status of the shipment and completed receiving in Staging location through RF Menu

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user update "Single Line PO" for dropping into fedexnet application
user logs into the FedexNet application
user upload "856" XML file in fedexnet
user log out from Fedenxet application
user logs into the Manhattan application
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "20 - InTransit"
user views ASN, get and verify item details
user opens RF menu and completes Receiving using "MM3 Recv-CASE" menu
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "40 - Receiving Verified"
user opens RF menu and completes Putaway using "MM3 Ptwy CASE" menu
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the lock code
user open reserve locations and naviagtes to validate iLPN
user log out from application

comments.value: #	@QSC_IB008 @Regression_QSC  @QSC_UnDeliveredReceive
#Scenario: B-441160 Receiving Returned Un-Delivered Product by creating ASN & completing putaway
#Receiving of Un-Delivered Product in MM3 Rtrn/Ovrg menu by creating ASN and verifying the status of the ASN & completing Putaway
#	Given I have excel data
#	| QSC_IBScenario008 |
#	And Open the chrome browser by selenium
#	And user logs into the Manhattan application
#    When user create xml file using "Single Line Return ASN" with updated ASNNo & DeliveryStartDate for ReceivingASN
#    And user update xml itemDetails from excel sheet
#    And user opens post message screen and upload file in order to create ASN
#	Then user verify the response
#	Then user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "20 - InTransit"
#	And user views ASN, get and verify item details
#	And user opens RF menu and completes Receiving using "MM3 Rtrn/Ovrg" menu
#	Then user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "30 - Receiving Started"
#	And user verifies the ASN "40 - Receiving Verified"
#	Then user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the lock code
#	And user open reserve locations & naviagtes to "QC111A1" zone and fetches the current quantity
#	And user opens RF menu and completes Putaway using "MM3 Ptwy CASE" menu
#	Then user navigates to reserve locations & validates that the quantity is increased in "QC111A1" by no of iLPN's moved
#	Then validates that the iLPN is also moved to inspection zone "QC111A1"
#	Then user log out from application

elements.name: B-459309 Receive Damages- Receiving Damaged Product using MM3 Recv-Damages & Putaway
elements.description: Receiving of Damaged Products in MM3 Recv-Damages option from RF menu and verifying the status of the ASN & completing Putaway

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user update "Single Line PO" for dropping into fedexnet application
user logs into the FedexNet application
user upload "856" XML file in fedexnet
user log out from Fedenxet application
user logs into the Manhattan application
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "20 - InTransit"
user views ASN, get and verify item details
user opens RF menu and completes Receiving using "MM3 Recv-Damages" menu
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "40 - Receiving Verified"
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the lock code
user open reserve locations & naviagtes to "QC111A1" zone and fetches the current quantity
user opens RF menu and completes Putaway using "MM3 Ptwy CASE" menu
user navigates to reserve locations & validates that the quantity is increased in "QC111A1" by no of iLPN's moved
validates that the iLPN is also moved to inspection zone "QC111A1"
user log out from application

elements.name: B-467729 – Configure Manhattan for RF lock-unlock iLPN-- Lock an iLPN using the user provided lock code
elements.description: Create an iLPN using RF MM3 Create iLPN option and apply the lock code provided by user

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into the Manhattan application
user opens RF menu and go to invenorty & perform "RF MM3 Create iLPN" operation
user open iLPN and applies the lock code
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the lock code
validates the PIX Transactions "300,606" for this operation
user log out from application

elements.name: B-467729 – Configure Manhattan for RF lock-unlock iLPN-- Unlock an iLPN which already has some lock

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into the Manhattan application
user opens RF menu and completes Receiving using "MM3 Rtrn/Ovrg" menu
user open iLPN and unlock the existing code
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the lock code
validates the PIX Transactions "300,606" for this operation
user log out from application

elements.name: B-474831 FXL-FFD-CIL-MH_Inventory Control-Base Transactions# 4- Consume iLPN having no lock
elements.description:
Creating ASN through Post Message UI and complete receiving bypasing through staging location & 
validating iLPN have no lock & consume the iLPN using RF Menu. Also validate PIX transaction

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user update "Single Line PO" for dropping into fedexnet application
user logs into the FedexNet application
user upload "856" XML file in fedexnet
user log out from Fedenxet application
user logs into the Manhattan application
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "20 - InTransit"
user opens RF menu and completes "MM3 Rec-CASE-Ptwy" operation in Misc menu
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the lock code
user opens RF menu and completes "MM3 Consume iLPN" operation in Misc menu
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the iLPN status
validates the PIX Transactions "300" for consuming iLPN
user log out from application

elements.name: B-474831 FXL-FFD-CIL-MH_Inventory Control-Base Transactions# 4- Consume iLPN having lock code
elements.description:
Creating iLPN through MM3 Create iLPN menu & applythe lock code,validating iLPN have some lock code & consume 
the iLPN using RF Menu. Also validate PIX transaction.

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into the Manhattan application
user opens RF menu and go to invenorty & perform "RF MM3 Create iLPN" operation
user open iLPN and applies the lock code
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the lock code
user opens RF menu and completes "MM3 Consume iLPN" operation in Misc menu
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the iLPN status
validates the PIX Transactions "606" for consuming iLPN
user log out from application

comments.value: #	@QSC_IB035 @Regression_QSC  @QSC_PartiallyVerified
#Scenario: Receiving 1st line with more than shipped quantities and 2nd line with partial quantities - Same Item in both lines
#Creating ASN through Post Message UI, 1st line is Over Received and 2nd line with partial quantities of an
#ASN, Validate ASN is verified automatically
#	Given I have excel data
#	| QSC_IBScenario035 |
#	And Open the chrome browser by selenium
#	When user update "Multi Line PO" for dropping into fedexnet application
#	And user logs into the FedexNet application
#	And user upload "856" XML file in fedexnet
#	Then user log out from Fedenxet application
#	And user logs into the Manhattan application
#	Then user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "20 - InTransit"
#	And user views ASN, get and verify item details
#	And user opens RF menu and completes Receiving using "MM3 Recv-CASE" menu
#	Then user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "40 - Receiving Verified"
#	And validates the PIX message "606 - Un-allocable inventory adjustments"
#	And validates the PIX message "603 - Verify receipt"
#	Then user log out from application
